problem id: 9b2b3698
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10010101 -> 01000100
  00000000 -> 00000000
  00100100 -> 00000001
  01010011 -> 11000010
  10110101 -> 01000101
  11000011 -> 11000110
  11111110 -> 10000111
  00101100 -> 00000001
  00111101 -> 01000001

query: 00101001
predicted answer: 01000001
